title: Ohio Immigration Counsel for Human Resources
content:
## General Immigration Counsel in Ohio
At Brown Immigration Law we dedicate our exceptional practice exclusively to US Immigration law . Whether you represent a US or foreign enterprise, are large or small, we can offer your business our signature expertise in US employment-based immigration and compliance.
Having worked with hundreds of different types of businesses, including large Fortune 500 companies to new start-ups, non-profits to for-profit enterprises, public and private institutions, both from within and outside of government, Robert Brown has equipped our attorneys with knowledge and experience not otherwise available. Our attorneys will work directly with you and your company to determine the best immigration solution for your needs, providing comprehensive legal guidance and advocacy for both short-term and long-term goals.
The Ohio immigration attorneys at our firm are well-versed in recognizing and troubleshooting issues commonly faced by business, ranging from deciding which specific visa is best suited for your employees to navigating the often complex maze of visa issuance. Our decades of immigration experience has lead hundreds of companies and businesses to utilize our immigration services, whether it be obtaining an H-1B for a long-term professional employee to a one-time small business need for repeat employees arriving from overseas.
Brown Immigration Law offers unique arrangements for businesses with ongoing or repeated immigration needs, including modified fixed fee schedules and retainer agreements. Our clients have found such agreements can not only help in limiting costs and estimating yearly budgets, but also are a convenient means to have counsel available for the most pressing of needs.
If you are a business owner or human resource manager, contact Brown Immigration Law for all of your immigration needs. Have confidence in experience.
Providing immigration solutions in Ohio, North Carolina, and Florida. Contact us today for a personalized consultation.
